codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 1e56a2c, the worker handoff, transcript skeleton, validation contract, and adjacent route/test coverage. The implementation meaningfully hardens `/search` family bounds and adds regression coverage for canonical-platform alias continuity across token-list and contract-address flows. I did not find any high-confidence correctness or regression issues in scope for VAL-CATALOG-003..010, VAL-CROSS-003..005, and VAL-BASE-008.

summary: Pass. The feature’s code diff is narrowly scoped and supported by existing plus newly added tests for blank-query rejection, grouped-family stability, bounded search results, trending truncation/validation, global chart params/order, canonical asset-platform discovery, alias continuity, unknown token-list failure, and externally started smoke-script behavior via BASE_URL readiness gating.
